zh.Saint Petrock, Exeter, Devon, England: 英國英格蘭戴文艾可謝特艾可謝特 聖 德洛可
zh.lifeSummary: Julyan Strache於1532年1月1日出生在英國英格蘭貝德福爾諾迪爾。她於1552年10月17日與Sir Knight John Wheaton Or Weeden在英國英格蘭戴文艾可謝特艾可謝特 聖 德洛可結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1587年在她的家鄉享年56歲。

nameMeanings.name: Strache
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard, Lothar, Reiner.

variants.name: Strack
meanings: North German: from Middle Low German strak ‘stiff’, hence a nickname for an upright and highly principled person or alternatively for someone who was obstinate.

nameMeanings.name: Julyan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Julian
meanings: From the common Late Latin name Julianus, a derivative of Julius . In classical times Julianus was a name borne not only by various minor early saints, but also by the Roman emperor Julian ‘the Apostate’, who attempted to return the Roman Empire from institutionalized Christianity to paganism. For many centuries the English name Julian was borne by women as well as men, for example by the Blessed Julian of Norwich ( c.1342– after 1413 ). The differentiation in form between Julian and Gillian did not develop until the 16th century. Julian is still occasionally used as a girl's name. Notable bearers include the British classical guitarist Julian Bream ( b. 1933 ) and the British jazz pianist and bandleader Julian Joseph ( b. 1966 ).

en.lifeSummary: Julyan Strache was born on 1 January 1532, in Northill, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. She married Sir Knight John Wheaton Or Weeden on 17 October 1552, in Exeter St Petrock, Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died about 1587, in her hometown, at the age of 56.

Elle a épousé Sir Knight John Wheaton Or Weeden le 17 octobre 1552, à Exeter St Petrock, Exeter, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1587, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Julyan Stracheは1532年1月1日にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアノースイルで生まれた。1552年10月17日にイギリスイギリスデボンエクセターエクセター スト ペトロックでSir Knight John Wheaton Or Weedenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1587年に故郷で56歳で死去した。

ko.Saint Petrock, Exeter, Devon, England: 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 세터 세터 스트 페트록
ko.lifeSummary: Julyan Strache(은)는 1532년 1월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 노르스이에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1552년 10월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 세터 세터 스트 페트록에서 Sir Knight John Wheaton Or Weeden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1587년 그녀의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Julyan Strache родилась 1 января 1532 г. в местности нортилл, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Knight John Wheaton Or Weeden 17 октября 1552 г. в местности эксетир ст петрокк, эксетир, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1587 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 56 лет.
